jobs.name: Daily Nimaraa Content Intelligence
jobs.prompt:
You are running a daily content-intelligence brief for Daksh's AI health-agent app, Nimaraa. Website: https://nimaraa.ai

Goal: Every day, inspect what is currently working in the AI health / health assistant / wellness AI / personal health agent domain across these platforms: LinkedIn, X/Twitter, Reddit, Instagram, Substack, and Facebook. Then tell Daksh how Nimaraa can capitalize on it with content ideas.

Important constraints:
- Do NOT create, edit, or remove cron jobs from this run.
- Use live web sources/searches; do not rely on memory. If a platform is inaccessible or login-gated, say so and use public search results/web-indexed posts as a fallback.
- Start by briefly checking Nimaraa's website/landing page so recommendations fit the product positioning.
- Focus on actionable opportunities, not a generic strategy document.
- Prefer fresh signals from the last 24–72 hours when available; if not available, use recent visible examples and label freshness.
- Keep the report concise and platform-wise.

Daily report format:
## Nimaraa Daily Content Intelligence — <date>

### 1) Today's pattern summary
- 3–5 bullets on what seems to be working right now in AI health / health agent content.

### 2) Platform-wise opportunities
For each platform — LinkedIn, X/Twitter, Reddit, Instagram, Substack, Facebook — include:
- What is working / observed signal
- Why it matters for Nimaraa
- 2–3 concrete post/content ideas Daksh can make today
- Suggested format/hook
- Source links or search evidence

### 3) Best 5 content bets for today
Rank the top 5 posts to create today, with hook + angle + platform.

### 4) Cautions
Mention any compliance/trust caveats for AI health content: avoid medical claims, frame as education/support, encourage professional medical advice where relevant.

Deliver only the final report to Telegram.
